_provenance: schema-derived from AC-V3.3. Clear-minutes constant name matches .env convention FLEET_CORRELATION_CLEAR_MINUTES=30. Timestamps use fixed wall-clock values.

cases.label: alert_clears_after_30_min_no_new_events
cases.note: Last fleet event at 10:33:00 ET; check at 11:03:01 ET (30min+1s later with no new events) — alert must be absent

cases.label: alert_persists_before_30_min_elapsed
cases.note: Last fleet event at 10:33:00 ET; check at 11:02:59 ET (29min59s later) — alert must still be present

cases.label: alert_persists_when_new_fleet_events_keep_resetting_timer
cases.note: New fleet event at 10:50:00 ET resets the 30-min clock; check at 11:03:01 ET (13min after last event) — alert must persist
